description: Create a nightly release GitHub Actions workflow that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for build number and repository URL. It sets version variables and then uses these to build various packages (C++, DEB, .NET, GEM, MATLAB, Maven, MSI, NPM, PIP, RPM, XCFramework, and Brew Bottle) for a nightly release, publishing them to specified repositories.
